content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 10, 2004

Alita Godwin, City Clerk
City of Compton
Office of the City Clerk
205 So. Willowbrook Avenue
Compton, CA 90220

Re: Our File No. W-04-046

Dear Ms. Godwin:

This correspondence is written confirmation that you have withdrawn your February 18, 2004, request for written advice on behalf of the City of Compton.

You have advised that a response under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ is no longer necessary.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
